articles.title: Texas Lt. Governor announces ‘Bitcoin Reserve’ as priority bill for 2025
articles.description: Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick revealed that establishing a Bitcoin reserve in the state will be among 2025’s legislative priorities.

articles.title: Ethereum Accumulation: World Liberty Financial Buys 39,242 ETH at $3,312 Average
articles.description: World Liberty Financial has invested $129.95 million in Ethereum (ETH) over the past seven days, accumulating 39,242 ETH at an average price of $3,312. The fund’s most recent purchase on January 28 added 3,247 ETH for $10 million, taking advantage of market price movements. articles.title: Crypto.com Moves to Delist USDT and 9 Other Tokens Under MiCA
articles.description: Crypto.com is delisting USDT and nine other tokens in Europe to comply with MiCA regulations.

articles.title: Czech Central Bank Considers Billions in Bitcoin Reserves
articles.description: Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl proposes investing billions in Bitcoin, aiming to diversify reserves and make CNB the first major central bank to hold it.
